requirement_topic.en: KEMCO High-Efficiency Equipment Certification — mandatory for government procurement
requirement_topic.zh: KEMCO高效设备认证 — 政府采购强制要求
requirement_topic.zht: KEMCO高效設備認證 — 政府採購強制要求

summary.en: KEMCO (Korea Energy Management Corporation) administers the High-Efficiency Equipment (고효율에너지기자재) certification programme under the Energy Use Rationalization Act. Motors certified under this programme must meet KEMCO-specified efficiency thresholds (which reference IEC 60034-30-1 IE class levels, typically IE3 or above at 60 Hz) and must be rated and tested at 60 Hz South Korean grid conditions. KEMCO high-efficiency certification is mandatory for motors purchased by government bodies and recommended/required in certain industrial sectors. Motors must be re-tested and certified specifically at 60 Hz.
summary.zh: KEMCO（韩国能源管理公司）根据《能源使用合理化法》管理高效能源设备认证计划。通过该计划认证的电机须满足KEMCO规定的效率门槛（参考IEC 60034-30-1 IE等级，通常为60 Hz下IE3或以上），并须在韩国60 Hz电网条件下额定和测试。KEMCO高效率认证对政府机构采购的电机为强制要求，在部分工业领域亦为推荐或强制要求。电机须专门在60 Hz下重新测试和认证。
summary.zht: KEMCO（韓國能源管理公司）根據《能源使用合理化法》管理高效能源設備認證計畫。通過該計畫認證的電機須滿足KEMCO規定的效率門檻（參考IEC 60034-30-1 IE等級，通常為60 Hz下IE3或以上），並須在韓國60 Hz電網條件下額定和測試。KEMCO高效率認證對政府機構採購的電機為強制要求，在部分工業領域亦為推薦或強制要求。電機須專門在60 Hz下重新測試和認證。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-30-1 (IE efficiency class reference at 60 Hz)

summary.en: China operates the China Energy Label (能效标识, CEL) system under the Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling (能效标识管理办法). For motors, GB 18613-2020 Grade 2 (IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level that qualifies for energy-saving procurement preference. Grade 3 (IE3) is the mandatory minimum. The CEL scheme is administered by SAMR/CNCA and differs from KEMCO both in scope and in technical criteria (50 Hz basis). CEL certification does not substitute for KEMCO certification.
summary.zh: 中国根据《能效标识管理办法》实施中国能效标识（CEL）制度。对电机而言，GB 18613-2020 2级（IE4）是节能评价值，可获节能采购优惠；3级（IE3）为强制最低要求。CEL制度由市场监管总局/国家认证认可监督管理委员会管理，与KEMCO在范围和技术标准（50 Hz基准）上均有所不同。CEL认证不能替代KEMCO认证。
summary.zht: 中國根據《能效標識管理辦法》實施中國能效標識（CEL）制度。對電機而言，GB 18613-2020 2級（IE4）是節能評價值，可獲節能採購優惠；3級（IE3）為強制最低要求。CEL制度由市場監管總局/國家認證認可監督管理委員會管理，與KEMCO在範圍和技術標準（50 Hz基準）上均有所不同。CEL認證不能替代KEMCO認證。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (Grade 2 = IE4 energy-saving evaluation level; Grade 3 = IE3 mandatory minimum)
Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling (能效标识管理办法)

gap.en: Chinese CEL (China Energy Label) certification or GB 18613-2020 efficiency grades do not substitute for South Korea KEMCO certification. KEMCO certification requires 60 Hz testing; Chinese motors are rated and labelled at 50 Hz. For government procurement in South Korea, KEMCO certification is a gate requirement that Chinese motors without a specific 60 Hz variant cannot meet using existing Chinese test data.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识（CEL）认证或GB 18613-2020效率等级不能替代韩国KEMCO认证。KEMCO认证要求在60 Hz下测试；中国电机以50 Hz额定和标注。对于韩国政府采购，KEMCO认证是门槛要求，没有专门60 Hz版本的中国电机无法凭现有中国测试数据满足该要求。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識（CEL）認證或GB 18613-2020效率等級不能替代韓國KEMCO認證。KEMCO認證要求在60 Hz下測試；中國電機以50 Hz額定和標注。對於韓國政府採購，KEMCO認證是門檻要求，沒有專門60 Hz版本的中國電機無法憑現有中國測試數據滿足該要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for government procurement; recommended or required in certain industrial sectors under South Korean energy efficiency policy
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB 18613-2020 Grade 2 / IE4 energy-saving evaluation level is voluntary; Grade 3 / IE3 is mandatory minimum)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors certified under GB 18613-2020 and carrying CEL labelling do not automatically qualify for South Korea's KEMCO high-efficiency certification. Exporters targeting government procurement must obtain KEMCO certification based on 60 Hz testing. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 通过GB 18613-2020认证并持有能效标识的中国电机，不能自动获得韩国KEMCO高效率认证资格。面向韩国政府采购的出口商必须基于60 Hz测试取得KEMCO认证。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 通過GB 18613-2020認證並持有能效標識的中國電機，不能自動獲得韓國KEMCO高效率認證資格。面向韓國政府採購的出口商必須基於60 Hz測試取得KEMCO認證。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Efficiency Test Method at 60 Hz — KS C IEC 60034-2-1
requirement_topic.zh: 60 Hz效率测试方法 — KS C IEC 60034-2-1
requirement_topic.zht: 60 Hz效率測試方法 — KS C IEC 60034-2-1

summary.en: South Korea adopts KS C IEC 60034-2-1 (equivalent to IEC 60034-2-1) as the test method standard for motor efficiency determination. Efficiency must be measured and declared at rated 60 Hz conditions for South Korea market placement. KEMCO and KC certification bodies require test reports based on 60 Hz conditions reflecting actual South Korean grid operation. Loss-segregation methods in KS C IEC 60034-2-1 require measured stray-load losses, not assumed values.
summary.zh: 韩国采用KS C IEC 60034-2-1（等同IEC 60034-2-1）作为电机效率测定测试方法标准。进入韩国市场须在额定60 Hz条件下测量并声明效率。KEMCO和KC认证机构要求基于60 Hz条件的测试报告，以反映韩国实际电网运行条件。KS C IEC 60034-2-1中的损耗分类法要求实测杂散负载损耗，而非假定值。
summary.zht: 韓國採用KS C IEC 60034-2-1（等同IEC 60034-2-1）作為電機效率測定測試方法標準。進入韓國市場須在額定60 Hz條件下測量並聲明效率。KEMCO和KC認證機構要求基於60 Hz條件的測試報告，以反映韓國實際電網運行條件。KS C IEC 60034-2-1中的損耗分類法要求實測雜散負載損耗，而非假定值。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-2-1 (adopted IEC 60034-2-1, efficiency test method at rated 60 Hz)
KEMCO certification technical criteria (60 Hz test basis)

summary.en: China uses GB/T 1032-2012 (Test Methods for Three-Phase Induction Motors) at 50 Hz as the primary test standard. GB/T 1032 permits assumed stray-load loss factors in some methods, which may yield higher calculated efficiency than IEC 60034-2-1 measured-loss methods. Chinese test reports are issued at 50 Hz rated conditions; these cannot be directly used for South Korea's 60 Hz KC or KEMCO certification without re-testing at 60 Hz.
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 1032-2012《三相异步电动机试验方法》在50 Hz条件下作为主要测试标准。GB/T 1032部分方法允许假定杂散负载损耗系数，可能导致计算效率高于IEC 60034-2-1的实测损耗法。中国测试报告以50 Hz额定条件出具；未经在60 Hz下重新测试，不能直接用于韩国60 Hz的KC或KEMCO认证。
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 1032-2012《三相異步電動機試驗方法》在50 Hz條件下作為主要測試標準。GB/T 1032部分方法允許假定雜散負載損耗係數，可能導致計算效率高於IEC 60034-2-1的實測損耗法。中國測試報告以50 Hz額定條件出具；未經在60 Hz下重新測試，不能直接用於韓國60 Hz的KC或KEMCO認證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 1032-2012 (三相异步电动机试验方法, at 50 Hz)
GB 18613-2020 (references GB/T 1032 for efficiency determination at 50 Hz)

gap.en: Chinese test reports issued under GB/T 1032-2012 at 50 Hz cannot be used directly for South Korea KC or KEMCO certification. A 60 Hz-specific test using KS C IEC 60034-2-1 (or equivalent IEC 60034-2-1) is required. The frequency difference alone invalidates 50 Hz efficiency data for 60 Hz market certification purposes. Additionally, GB/T 1032 assumed stray-load-loss treatment may inflate efficiency figures compared to KS C IEC 60034-2-1 measured-loss methods.
gap.zh: 在50 Hz条件下依GB/T 1032-2012出具的中国测试报告，不能直接用于韩国KC或KEMCO认证。须采用KS C IEC 60034-2-1（或等效IEC 60034-2-1）在60 Hz下进行专项测试。频率差异本身就使50 Hz效率数据不适用于60 Hz市场认证。此外，GB/T 1032假定杂散负载损耗处理方式可能导致效率数据高于KS C IEC 60034-2-1实测损耗法的结果。
gap.zht: 在50 Hz條件下依GB/T 1032-2012出具的中國測試報告，不能直接用於韓國KC或KEMCO認證。須採用KS C IEC 60034-2-1（或等效IEC 60034-2-1）在60 Hz下進行專項測試。頻率差異本身就使50 Hz效率數據不適用於60 Hz市場認證。此外，GB/T 1032假定雜散負載損耗處理方式可能導致效率數據高於KS C IEC 60034-2-1實測損耗法的結果。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — 60 Hz efficiency testing required for KC Mark and KEMCO certification for South Korea market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory reference — GB/T 1032-2012 referenced by GB 18613-2020 for 50 Hz efficiency determination; not applicable to 60 Hz market requirements

source.publisher: KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 1032-2012 test reports at 50 Hz are not directly acceptable for South Korea's KC Mark or KEMCO certification. Re-testing at 60 Hz to KS C IEC 60034-2-1 is required. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在50 Hz条件下依GB/T 1032-2012出具的中国测试报告，不能直接用于韩国KC标志或KEMCO认证。须按KS C IEC 60034-2-1在60 Hz下重新测试。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在50 Hz條件下依GB/T 1032-2012出具的中國測試報告，不能直接用於韓國KC標誌或KEMCO認證。須按KS C IEC 60034-2-1在60 Hz下重新測試。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: IE Efficiency Class Minimum for South Korea Market — KEMCO / ECPSA scope
requirement_topic.zh: 韩国市场IE效率等级最低要求 — KEMCO / ECPSA范围
requirement_topic.zht: 韓國市場IE效率等級最低要求 — KEMCO / ECPSA範圍

summary.en: Under South Korea's energy efficiency policy and KEMCO certification criteria, motors subject to the High-Efficiency Equipment programme are generally required to meet IE3 or higher efficiency class at 60 Hz (benchmarked per KS C IEC 60034-30-1). Motors for government procurement must satisfy KEMCO thresholds. The ECPSA mandates KC Mark for motors in its product scope regardless of efficiency class; efficiency class certification under KEMCO is an additional layer for procurement preference and mandated sectors. IE class assessment must be based on 60 Hz rated conditions, not 50 Hz Chinese test data.
summary.zh: 根据韩国能效政策和KEMCO认证标准，适用高效设备计划的电机通常须在60 Hz下达到IE3或更高效率等级（以KS C IEC 60034-30-1为基准）。政府采购用电机须满足KEMCO门槛。ECPSA对其产品范围内的电机强制要求KC标志，不受效率等级影响；KEMCO下的效率等级认证是采购优惠和强制行业的额外层级。IE等级评定须基于60 Hz额定条件，不得使用50 Hz中国测试数据。
summary.zht: 根據韓國能效政策和KEMCO認證標準，適用高效設備計畫的電機通常須在60 Hz下達到IE3或更高效率等級（以KS C IEC 60034-30-1為基準）。政府採購用電機須滿足KEMCO門檻。ECPSA對其產品範圍內的電機強制要求KC標誌，不受效率等級影響；KEMCO下的效率等級認證是採購優惠和強制行業的額外層級。IE等級評定須基於60 Hz額定條件，不得使用50 Hz中國測試數據。

standards_or_laws: KS C IEC 60034-30-1 (IE class at 60 Hz)
ECPSA (KC Mark — separate from efficiency class, but both required)

summary.en: GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 (Grade 3) as the minimum for most three-phase induction motors in China at 50 Hz. Grade 2 (IE4) is the voluntary energy-saving evaluation level. These grades are determined at 50 Hz and are not directly transferable to 60 Hz South Korea market certification. A Chinese IE3 motor at 50 Hz will exhibit different efficiency characteristics when operated at 60 Hz due to altered iron loss, slip, and cooling conditions.
summary.zh: GB 18613-2020规定中国大多数三相感应电动机在50 Hz下最低须达到IE3（3级）。2级（IE4）为节能评价值。这些等级以50 Hz确定，不能直接用于60 Hz韩国市场认证。中国IE3电机在50 Hz下的效率特性，与在60 Hz下运行时的效率特性不同（因铁损、转差率和冷却条件改变）。
summary.zht: GB 18613-2020規定中國大多數三相感應電動機在50 Hz下最低須達到IE3（3級）。2級（IE4）為節能評價值。這些等級以50 Hz確定，不能直接用於60 Hz韓國市場認證。中國IE3電機在50 Hz下的效率特性，與在60 Hz下運行時的效率特性不同（因鐵損、轉差率和冷卻條件改變）。

standards_or_laws: GB 18613-2020 (Grade 3 = IE3 mandatory minimum at 50 Hz; Grade 2 = IE4 voluntary energy-saving level)

gap.en: Chinese motors meeting GB 18613-2020 IE3 at 50 Hz do not automatically satisfy South Korea's IE3 threshold at 60 Hz. IE efficiency class values at 60 Hz must be separately measured and verified. Additionally, KEMCO certification requires 60 Hz test data, and KC Mark (ECPSA) is a separate mandatory gate. Chinese motors cannot use 50 Hz efficiency data for South Korea market access.
gap.zh: 在50 Hz下满足GB 18613-2020 IE3的中国电机，不能自动满足韩国60 Hz下的IE3门槛。60 Hz的IE效率等级值须另行测量和核验。此外，KEMCO认证要求60 Hz测试数据，KC标志（ECPSA）是另一独立强制门槛。中国电机不能使用50 Hz效率数据进入韩国市场。
gap.zht: 在50 Hz下滿足GB 18613-2020 IE3的中國電機，不能自動滿足韓國60 Hz下的IE3門檻。60 Hz的IE效率等級值須另行測量和核驗。此外，KEMCO認證要求60 Hz測試數據，KC標誌（ECPSA）是另一獨立強制門檻。中國電機不能使用50 Hz效率數據進入韓國市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for government procurement (KEMCO threshold at 60 Hz); KC Mark mandatory under ECPSA for motors in scope regardless of efficiency class
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 IE3 minimum at 50 Hz enforced by SAMR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motors with GB 18613-2020 IE3 certification at 50 Hz cannot use that certification to satisfy South Korea's KEMCO or KC Mark requirements. Motors must be re-rated, re-tested at 60 Hz, and separately certified in South Korea. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 持有50 Hz条件下GB 18613-2020 IE3认证的中国电机，不能以该认证满足韩国KEMCO或KC标志要求。电机须在60 Hz下重新额定、重新测试，并在韩国另行认证。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 持有50 Hz條件下GB 18613-2020 IE3認證的中國電機，不能以該認證滿足韓國KEMCO或KC標誌要求。電機須在60 Hz下重新額定、重新測試，並在韓國另行認證。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
